title: taraxacum cristatum
intro: Taraxacum cristatum, also known as the crested dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Taraxacum cristatum lie in its leaves, roots, and flowers, which are rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum cristatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
